message:
fix(compression): update to Zig 0.15.2 Reader API and rebuild WAMR with SIMD+GC

- Update compression.zig to use reader.allocRemaining() instead of
  non-existent reader.read() method in Zig 0.15.2 std.Io.Reader
- Rebuild libiwasm.a with WAMR_BUILD_SIMD=1 and WAMR_BUILD_GC=1 to
  support AOT modules compiled with SIMD and GC features
- Compression uses "stored" blocks (no actual compression) since
  Zig 0.15.2's flate.Compress is incomplete, but decompression works
